title: oedera resinifera
intro: Oedera resinifera, also known as the sticky oedera or sticky bitter leaf, is a succulent plant native to the Western Cape Province of South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oedera resinifera include relief from coughs, colds, and sore throats, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. Oedera resinifera can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
